# Salmen Khelifi

> Full-stack, mobile, DevOps, and automation/AI freelancer with 5+ years of experience and a 4.9★ rating across 8 reviews on Freelancer.com.

## Services

- Full-stack web application development with React, Vue.js, Node.js, Laravel, PHP, and WordPress
- Mobile-friendly and responsive web experiences
- n8n, automation, AI workflow, and API integration work
- DevOps, deployment automation, Linux server troubleshooting, and production support
